page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8y.16xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores on the custom 64-bit ARM architecture, utilizing the Alibaba YiTian710 processor running at a baseline frequency of 2.75 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each of the 64 vCPUs maps directly to a physical core, ensuring dedicated compute allocation without resource sharing. The instance is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, providing a high resource density of 8.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps, facilitating efficient data transfers for distributed workloads. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the custom ARM-based YiTian710 architecture is designed to deliver high energy efficiency and resource density, offering a favorable performance-per-watt profile for memory-intensive deployments compared to traditional x86 architectures.

Given the 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated core allocation, the ecs.r8y.16xlarge is engineered for memory-heavy workloads. It is highly suitable for large-scale in-memory databases, caching layers, enterprise resource planning systems, data analytics pipelines, and memory-intensive containerized applications that benefit from the high core count and memory capacity of the ARM64 platform.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8y.16xlarge is an ARM-based, memory-optimized instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores on the custom Alibaba YiTian710 processor running at 2.75 GHz, with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration that ensures dedicated compute allocation. The instance is configured with 512.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high 1:8 vCPU-to-memory ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage, relying on network-attached storage, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. Utilizing the energy-efficient ARM64 architecture, this instance offers high resource density and qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive deployments. It is optimized for workloads such as in-memory databases, caching layers, data analytics, and enterprise applications requiring substantial memory capacity and dedicated CPU resources.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8y.16xlarge is an ARM64 memory-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated YiTian710 cores, 512 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

tagline: An ARM-powered, memory-optimized instance featuring sixty-four dedicated cores and half a terabyte of RAM for demanding enterprise databases.

64 dedicated physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration
512 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core
